line.token: * Searching keyword from search functionality form
* and an instance of database connection
WHERE (post_title LIKE ? OR post_content LIKE ? OR post_tags LIKE ?)
WHERE (post_title LIKE ? OR post_content LIKE ? OR post_tags LIKE ?)
WHERE (post_title LIKE ? OR post_content LIKE ? OR post_tags LIKE ?)
WHERE (post_title LIKE ? OR post_content LIKE ? OR post_tags LIKE ?)
